mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_CODE AS staffNo, EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_NAME AS staffName FROM EMPLOYEE AS EMPLOYEE INNER JOIN PLANT ON 1=1 INNER JOIN PARA_PLANT ON PARA_PLANT.Owner_Org_ROid=PLANT.PLANT_ID WHERE EMPLOYEE.ApproveStatus = N'Y' AND PLANT_CODE='1'

SELECT EMPLOYEE_CODE AS employeeNo, EMPLOYEE_NAME AS employeeName FROM WORK_TEAM LEFT JOIN dbo.WORK_TEAM_D ON WORK_TEAM_D.WORK_TEAM_ID = WORK_TEAM.WORK_TEAM_ID LEFT JOIN dbo.EMPLOYEE ON EMPLOYEE.EMPLOYEE_ID = WORK_TEAM_D.EMPLOYEE_ID WHERE WORK_TEAM_CODE=#{groupNo} AND WORK_TEAM.ApproveStatus='Y' ORDER BY WORK_TEAM_CODE,EMPLOYEE_CODE

SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_CODE AS employeeNo, e.EMPLOYEE_NAME AS employeeName, ISNULL(au.ADMIN_UNIT_CODE,'')AS departmentNo, ISNULL(au.ADMIN_UNIT_NAME,'')AS departmentName FROM EMPLOYEE AS e LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE_D AS ed ON ed.EMPLOYEE_ID = e.EMPLOYEE_ID AND ed.IS_PRIMARY = 1 LEFT JOIN ADMIN_UNIT AS au ON au.ADMIN_UNIT_ID = ed.ADMIN_UNIT_ID WHERE e.EMPLOYEE_CODE = #{employeeNo}
